Description: Implementation of various edge cases, fail-safes, and UI fallbacks discovered during MVP 1-3 testing.
Ensure ranked jobs only become searchable once scored.
Add httpx verification for URLs found in output.
Gracefully skip UPSERTs if LinkedIn URL is missing.
Fallback to technical-specialist template if job type is null.
Enforce time-bound sessions rather than per-action prompts.
Provide fallback to manual inputs if API takes too long.
Add clipboard copy capability as fallback for Cover Letter Export.
